---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: feature
assignees: ''

---

## Feature Description
Describe the feature or improvement you would like to see.

## Why is this useful?
Explain why this feature would help users, modders, or developers.

## Suggested Behavior
Describe how it should work.

## Alternatives
Have you tried another way to solve this?

## Additional Information
Add screenshots, examples, or references if helpful.
